prompt_text:
### Demographics: 65-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.6 kg; Height 158.2 cm; BMI 31.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 145/89 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 201mg/dL; 9 months ago 190mg/dL; 6 months ago 171mg/dL; 3 months ago 139mg/dL; current 161mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 80.3kg; 9 months ago 76.8kg; 6 months ago 79.2kg; 3 months ago 77.2kg; current 77.6kg), Height (12 months ago 158.2cm; 9 months ago 158.2cm; 6 months ago 158.2cm; 3 months ago 158.2cm; current 158.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 144mmHg; 9 months ago 148mmHg; 6 months ago 147mmHg; 3 months ago 145mmHg; current 145mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 88mmHg; current 89mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 26U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 47mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 39mg/g; 9 months ago 37mg/g; 6 months ago 50mg/g; 3 months ago 35mg/g; current 40mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 66mg/dL; 9 months ago 71mg/dL; 6 months ago 71mg/dL; 3 months ago 67mg/dL; current 70mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 59mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 165mg/dL; 9 months ago 167mg/dL; 6 months ago 164mg/dL; 3 months ago 164mg/dL; current 157mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
